summary: Completed backend testing of POST /api/trust-units/bootstrap-from-minutes/{minutes_id} endpoint. All 6 tests passed (1 skipped due to insufficient remaining units). The endpoint correctly creates Trust Unit Certificates from 'Designation of Beneficiaries' minutes records.
passed_tests: POST /api/trust-units/bootstrap-from-minutes/{minutes_id} - Successfully creates certificates from fresh minutes
critical_code_review_comments: Endpoint implementation is robust with proper validation at all stages
Duplicate prevention uses notes field regex to detect existing certificates from same minutes
Meeting_date from minutes template_data correctly used as issue_date for certificates
Response model BootstrapFromMinutesResponse properly defined with all required fields

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed, 1 skipped due to data constraints)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple designation_of_beneficiaries minutes records during testing for bootstrap verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bootstrap-from-minutes endpoint fully tested. The endpoint creates trust unit certificates from designation_of_beneficiaries minutes records. Test created several minutes records (min_34f729dfe9ec, min_f2b808b1c37a, min_a69248ebb9a9) which have already been bootstrapped. The trust trust_b753cb8fe07f now has 99 units issued out of 100 authorized (1 remaining). For future testing with successful bootstrap, either increase total_authorized_units or use a different trust.
